title: SpongeBob SquarePants Movie Game and Fursuits
description: Adds drywall building blocks, wool storage shelves in all colors, and a png item of movie. Used for literally 1 building project in ItsJim's upcoming video.
body:
This mod was made for ItsJim's upcoming mod competition video. Specifically used in the main competition, where it was made to assist with a singular building project, and a couple extras because literally anyone could've just used them too, like there was nothing stopping them.

The goal of this mod is to add blocks that would fit well in a "fursuit maker" build, if you can see that. (Movie unrelated)

- It adds drywall blocks, coming in stairs, slabs, and fences.
- It also adds drywall boards, coming in stairs, slabs, and fences as well.
- It adds "storage shelves" made of wool and iron, which come in all 16 colors.
- Finally, it adds a png of MOVIE.

Check the gallery for more information, and to see what it all looks like.
(the name is memorable, dw, trust)
